text.title: Stakeholder Communication Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: map-stakeholders
step.action: Place each on Power/Interest grid; assign cadence + channel per quadrant.

step.name: select-mode
step.action: Pick one of 5 modes that matches the goal.
step.decision-gate: If goal spans 2 modes, split into 2 sessions.

step.name: draft-plan
step.action: Compose plan: agenda, opening, mode-specific question set.

step.name: run-session
step.action: Run within the chosen mode; if drift detected, pause and re-orient.
step.decision-gate: If mid-session drift, refocus or close and schedule next.

step.name: write-back
step.action: Within 24h: confirm in writing; tag agreements; assign owners.
